commit.subject: LU-16954 test: fortestonly for duplicate filename failure
commit.message:
LU-16954 test: fortestonly for duplicate filename failure

Debug code for duplicate filanme failure during mount.

Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=ubuntu2204 testlist=sanity-sec
Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=ubuntu2204 testlist=sanity
Test-Parameters: trivial clientdistro=ubuntu2204 testlist=conf-sanity
Signed-off-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I89b75342db5db6cc975932b81fb0aea4e6286c54
